modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Question about the theme tool in Google Blogger

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to figure out this theme tool in Google Blogger. Like, what is it exactly? I just don’t get what it does or how to use it. Can someone explain it to me?
short_description: Question about the theme tool in Google Blogger
description: So, I was trying to figure out this theme tool in Google Blogger. Like, what is it exactly? I just don’t get what it does or how to use it. Can someone explain it to me?
